description: Normalized record of incoming client change requests, categorization, and classification

requests.name: Management CRUD Control and Real-time Sync
requests.rawRequest: every management needs full CRUD control in Admin, and every field change should be able to save and real time update on User Dashboard and Public pages as well
requests.normalizedBrief: Enable full CRUD configuration on admin panels, and ensure immediate real-time caching updates for User Dashboards and public calculations.
requests.intentSummary: Admin CRUD operations should propagate dynamically and bust frontend caches.

requests.name: Base Role Signup and MLM Rank Promotion Fix
requests.rawRequest: Also Users when signing up are given leadership role first itself, make it like the User has base role, and only by ranking they can level up to become a leader
requests.normalizedBrief: Newly registered users default to 'user' role; role changes to 'leader' only upon rank promotion.
requests.intentSummary: Prevent premature leader role assignments on registration, promoting only when rank exceeds minimum rank level.

requests.name: Leadership Eligibility Toggle in Plan Builder
requests.rawRequest: add an option in Plan builder to toggle if Leadership is Eligible or not
requests.normalizedBrief: Add an isLeadershipEligible toggle to the Plan model, UI, and API. Skip volume calculation if false.
requests.intentSummary: Enable admin to toggle if an investment plan contributes to MLM / binary tree structures.
